_readme: DoomXR gesture table. Read natively by vr_gesture.cpp at runtime from the dir next to doomxr.exe (like vr_hardpoints.json). Each entry: id (unique), anchor (chest/hip_l/hip_r/shoulder_l/shoulder_r/temple/wrist_main/wrist_off/belt/back/none), hand (main/off/either), motion (flick/thrust/shove/arc/circle_cw/circle_ccw/slash/guard/catch/place/reversal/none), gate (button-bit as an integer; 0 = pose-only = NOT multiplayer-safe), radius (map units to the anchor), dwell (tics the condition must hold before firing), action (ZScript action name; defaults to id), owned (bool; the shop flips this). Adding/editing entries needs NO recompile.

gestures._comment: chest-pouch reload: off-hand flick at the chest, confirmed by the offhand reload bit (1<<28 = 268435456).
wrist-top grapple quick-cast: main hand taps the off-hand wrist. gate 0 for now (pose-only); wire to a real bit for MP.
sigil circle overcharge: trace a circle with the off hand near the weapon; drives an elemental FX.
called-shot point: off-hand thrust toward a target designates a weak point (arming condition; the real kill stays on the fire button).
belt grenade pull: off-hand flick at the belt anchor, quick grenade primed on pull.
